response.justification: Bogdan Szabo has extensive full-stack and embedded development experience with strong C/C++ and Linux skills, but his resume lacks direct alignment with embedded networking, LAN-switch products, or security features. His background is heavily skewed toward web, mobile, and general software development without demonstrated experience in networking protocols, embedded firmware, or security technologies like MACsec or 802.1X. Additionally, there is no evidence of native-level Japanese proficiency or experience with Linux kernel modifications as required.
strengths: Strong C/C++ proficiency with embedded and Linux experience
Experience with networking-related projects (e.g., Sound Position Server using Jack audio server)
Proven track record as a senior software engineer across diverse domains
concerns: No direct experience with embedded networking or LAN-switch products
No demonstrated knowledge of security technologies (MACsec, 802.1X, encryption)
No indication of native-level Japanese proficiency or Linux kernel modification capability
